title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 connector (Public Preview)
body: The fully-managed Microsoft Dynamics 365 connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from Dynamics 365 applications like Sales, Customer Service, Finance & Operations, and more into Databricks. See [Configure data source for Microsoft Dynamics 365 ingestion](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/d365-source-setup).

ref_links.text: Configure data source for Microsoft Dynamics 365 ingestion
